tweets.text:
Long story short on how I fully immersed in the @solana ecosystem 

~ 2020: My Solana journey started when I participated in the Coinlist auction and staked tokens for 12 months. I saw the potential and jumped in. It is still the most profitable investment I’ve ever made. 

~ 2022: @Stepnofficial was launched and I was one of the early users. I was burning 11 energies daily by running 55 min. I one month I had a injury and decided to train with a personal running coach. Opening shoe boxes, upgrading my NFTs, claiming achievements and collecting gems was super fun. 

The same year I visited my first Breakpoint by @SolanaConf in Lisbon right after the FTX crash. I knew I had to get more involved so during the next 2 years I was participating or speaking in almost every large web3 conference in the world. 

~ 2023: We ran acceleration program and partnered up with @KumekaTeam to help Ukrainian builders develop their products on Solana. The same year I put skin in the game by providing significant liquidity to @MarginFinance (top 500 out of 200k users), @Parcl (top 50 out of 750k users) and many other protocols.

~ 2024: I learned a lot at the Founders Villa by @SuperteamUAE and built friendship with many great people from the ecosystem. I am truly grateful to @afscott and the team for putting together the incredible program:
3 weeks, 50+ founders, 40+ workshops, 3 demo days. Inspiring on every level. At the Founders Villa we rebranded from RentSpace to @nomadz_co - a community-driven platform for travelers on Solana. Our mission is to give travelers freedom to use crypto with the lowest booking fees (6-8%), 0% off-ramp through @Backpack exchange and gamification with digital rewards.

I am helping other builders grow through @venture_launch - accelerator and fundraising platform for startups building on Solana. Besides acceleration program we help founders to set up legal structures. In January 2025 we will launch our first cohort to help founders with a milestone based fundraising. If you are building on Solana - you can always DM me and apply to join the program. 

I am honoured to be a mentor at various accelerators in Solana ecosystem: @BuidlerDAO, @MediarsAccel, @SuperteamBLKN, @SuperteamPHL and @KumekaTeam. Helping to grow and being a friend to founders is my favourite part of the journey.

~ 2025: Now we are organising Solana Temple by @flow_bali. It is a 4-week wellness-first program that supported by @solanafndt for founders and investors seeking balance, focus, and sustainable growth. 

Solana Temple is unique as it will have a structured wellness routine with daily morning meditations, sports and yoga practices. We will be packed with workshops, pitch preparation sessions and Demo Days. We will organise hiking, surfing, sound healing, cacao ceremonies, silence days and more. We will track daily health performance of guests with our partners - @CudisWellness. Moreover we will support and track social media and business performance of teams. We will create a lot of high quality content with our partners from @magFOMO.

I am grateful to my partners @cryptoslice and @Yavorskyy13 for creating this program together. To @therealchaseeb for believing in us and supporting. To my girlfriend @cryptokitty3x for supporting me on every single level and creating great content for our brands. And to my teams for working continuously hard while I am writing tweets and generating ideas.

Applications to Solana Temple are opened till 15th of December and we are already more than 50% pre booked: https://t.co/5rY1SyYe8f

How and when did you join Solana ecosystem?  

Share what are you building in comments.

New Chapter for WIDI begins now.

Rebranding ahead & sunsetting $WIDI

TL;DR

$WIDI will no longer be the core token across our products. 

Our app, existing & upcoming products, team, roadmap, and long-term vision remain fully active.

To stay aligned with what’s next, our community can burn their $WIDI tokens to be considered for future allocations.

Burn deadline: February 20, 2026
Burn link: https://t.co/Hxow6hdxao

WHY?

Over time, we reached a clear and honest conclusion:

We couldn’t define token utility in a way that genuinely reflected the real value of our products.
As a result, the token’s market dynamics and our product progress started to diverge and we don’t believe that’s healthy for builders or for the community.

WIDI has never been about short-term narratives or token-first decisions.
It’s always been about shipping, iterating fast, and building long-term on Solana.

We’re entering a bigger phase fully focused on DEFAI starting with our upcoming prediction markets & AI integrations.

To do that right, we’re moving toward a cleaner, more flexible capital structure giving us full optionality to stay bootstrapped, raise strategically, or explore acquisitions after the rebrand.

Burning your tokens keeps you eligible for future allocations tied to what comes next.

This update is about alignment.

WHAT WE'VE DONE SO FAR?

Before & since the launch of $WIDI, we’ve:
- Received over-limit grants from Solana Foundation
- Led Blinks ecosystem with our first of its kind tools
- Built an App on Seeker and shipped real products with thousands of active users, generating over $2M in in-app volume so far. (actively being used)
- Airdropped to multiple Solana communities, starting with Seeker holders
- Reached sustainable revenue levels that cover our operational costs

WHAT'S CHANGING?

- All existing products, App will continue to be developed, nothing changes
- $WIDI will no longer have product-level utility and won’t be the core token of our ecosystem
- We’re moving forward with a rebrand (details soon)

New products are coming, starting with prediction markets (launching this week)

Our focus remains 100% on WIDI.

This is not a f. step back.
This is us doubling down. 🤝

LOYALTY MATTERS

We deeply care about our loyal holders and believers.
We couldn’t have come this far without them.

This applies to anything we launch going forward.
To remain part of the WIDI ecosystem and be considered for future opportunities, holders may choose to burn their $WIDI tokens.

Burned tokens will be tracked via an on-chain snapshot of participating wallets.

This snapshot may be used for potential future allocations, including:
- Equity considerations
- Strategic upside from fundraising or acquisition scenarios
- Potential token distribution

Important notes:

- Allocation size (X%) will depend entirely on future capital structure
- More burned = higher proportional consideration
- If you’re not a holder yet, purchasing and burning tokens before the deadline will also make you eligible.
- Long-time holders who participate in the burn will receive additional benefits, as a recognition of their early support.
- Even if you choose not to participate in the burn, $WIDI will remain freely tradable on Solana through permanently locked liquidity pools.

The foundation will wind down its treasury (roughly 40%, including vested supply) and will be excluded from community burns, ensuring this allocation remains fully non-dilutive.

Additionally, our Telegram General channel will remain active.
All official updates and announcements will be shared on our X & Telegram both as always.

My DMs, my team’s DMs, and our support channel’s DMs are always open for any questions, collaborations, suggestions, or support related to our app and products.

Token Burn deadline: February 20, 2026

Also, affiliate badges on X will be reviewed and updated.
- Badges will remain for active leaders using the app
- Core team members will continue to hold their badges
- Inactive or no-longer-aligned affiliate badges will be removed

WHAT'S NEXT?

After the rebrand, WIDI may:
- Raise capital from angels or VCs
- Explore strategic acquisition opportunities
or continue fully bootstrapped

The exact path will depend on what best serves the long-term vision.

Expect more announcements soon👀

Our promise going forward

We’ll continue to be:
- One of the fastest-moving teams in DeFi × AI
- Deeply rooted in Solana
- Focused on building innovative products
- We’ll keep adapting, iterating, improving existing apps, and shipping new ones.

This update is only about the token.
Our commitment to building and to the ecosystem is stronger than ever.

We’re not done.
We’re just more focused.

Team WIDI 🤝

in this livestream with @meteora_my , i'm explaining how do i screening my token in this market for DLMM on @MeteoraAG 

it's a simple method but yet, very effective.

- use gmgn for the screener
- filter minimum 200k mcap
- minimum total fees paid 20 sol
- check the X community, what's the token really about, what's the narration behind the token. is it long lasting or just a hit tweet that tokenized
- check the holder, is there any suspicious holder or high frequency transfers

also a new things to check is the recently viewed on gmgn page. i also test this as an indicator how's that affecting.

more people see that token, meaning more people monitoring = more organic buy on that token.

imo, 100+ views on a tokens considered as good.
this feature >>> https://t.co/TTzIZs9S94
https://t.co/pcSZJLpkaC

some people ask me the same question. when and how do i cut losses in LPs on @MeteoraAG

honest take, i rarely cut losses on LPs. but there's a plenty situation that you can do when you position on losses.

don't panic, don't immediately take the L. @Heavymetalcook6 said 

https://t.co/u7TkhO5H1j

- some people would cutting their losses after their position out of range for 30 minutes.
- some people would cutting their losses when the token had no chance to survive (don't do this)
- some people use maximum threshold, i.e. 15% loss and i'll cut
- some people never cut losses and become community member (not a good one too)
- some people wait until the support can't hold first thing you need to do is, find out why the token dumping.

check the x comm, check who's selling. if the community didn't believe then just cut loss.

check the pump candle on 5m tf, who's holding the floor and still hold. you can click on the candle and filter the buy amount with gmgn. 

if the people who holding the floor get out, then it's time to cut loss.

never cut loss on a first dump, wait until retrace if the floor still holds you can hold your positions.

yes this method isn't the best way to cut losses, but if i select a token to LPs i fully believe about what i pick.

ini wallet temen gua yang start dlmm dari 0.2 sol, main lp itu ngga harus banyak, lu modal 15$ aja bisa dapet 0.5$-3$ per posisi di @MeteoraAG 

caranya gimana? kalo lu mau main cepet dengan avg hold time 5-20menit dan mau dapet di atas 5% pake tight range.

lu bisa main pake single side sol -20% atau -30% di token dengan volume kenceng, 100-400k/5menit.

emang jarang ada sekarang, tapi sekalinya ada lu bisa pake cara itu.

kalo lu pake range default atau -50% lu harus nunggu agak lama dulu kalo mau dapet gain diatas 5%.

LP ini kuncinya compounding, lu bisa lihat ss di bawah, dia mulai dari 17$, tiap dapet profit langsung dicompound terus terusan ampe jadi 2 sol.

kalo strat nyaman dan mental udah kebentuk, mau compound bakal cepet banget.

@MeteoraAG bukan penganut wide range karena efficiency + risk > everything.

wide range emang aman kalo buat pemula, cuma kalo lu udah tau risknya dan tau token yang lu pilih, efficiency matters.

cara gua paling simple buat milih token buat dlmm di @MeteoraAG  adalah cari narasi yang bagus.

menurut gua, narasi ini penting banget buat nentuin token ini bakal survive apa engga, bakal rebounce kalo abis koreksi apa engga.

gampangnya :

- cari tau apa sih token itu, ceritanya gimana ko bisa dibikin token itu
- viral ngga tokennya?
- tokennya terikat ke satu orang ngga
- token project ngga? kalo iya gimana projectnya dan devnya doxxed ngga

cara ini adalah cara paling gampang buat nentuin seberapa besar conviction gua ke token tersebut.

kalo udah dapet tokennya, tinggal pasang strategi yang cocok buat LP, gua lebih sering pake spot kalo dapet momentum pump + volume gede.

This is the dark side of crypto and self-custody:

Jan 2025 🇫🇷

- Ledger co-founder kidnapped with partner
- kidnappers wanted ~€10M in crypto
- part of his finger cut before police rescue

Apr 2025 🇫🇷

- 60-year-old father kidnapped
- finger cut to force payment
- €5–7M ransom demanded

May 2025 🇫🇷

- gang tried to grab crypto boss’s family in Paris
- bystanders stepped in
- attackers fled in a van

May 2025 🇺🇸

- two men charged in NYC
- victim held 17 days
- beaten and shocked for ~$28M BTC

Jun 2025 🇫🇷

- 23-year-old crypto user kidnapped
- partner handed over €5k + Ledger
- victim later released

Oct 2025 🇮🇩

- victim (influencer) was stopped on motorcycle
- kidnapped, phone taken
- forced to send crypto

Oct 2025 🇦🇪

- lured to Dubai villa
- tortured for wallet access
- killed when wallets were empty

Dec 2025 🇦🇹

- 21-year-old lured by "partners"
- attacked for wallet access
- funds moved; victim killed

Feb 2026 🇫🇷

- targeted due to partner’s crypto links
- kidnapped for ~30 hours
- later released

Feb 2026 🇮🇩

- Ukrainian national kidnapped in Bali
- group demanded up to $10M
- suspects later identified

I didn't come into crypto 9 years ago to launch a shit coin.

I didn't come into crypto to get rich quick.

I came into crypto because I believe it's going to change the world, and that the industry was something worth dedicating my life to.

But somewhere along the way, amidst the booms, the busts, the moonshots, the decentralization theater, and the straight up scams, we lost our way.

I don't know about you, but I'm just tired of false promises. And that's what most things are today, simply promises. We live in the most centralized era crypto has ever experienced, and the more centralized something is, the less meaningful a token is.

While it's tempting to want to commit to these same promises, what happens if the team gets acquired? What happens if we want to re-invest into growth? What happens if we divert our time, energy, and resources out of band and circumvent the token altogether? What happens when the team and investors unlock? For many projects, the honest answer to these questions is not pleasant, and you see it in the price chart over and over again.

Unless something is completely decentralized to the point where an immutable protocol can function with the team having retired in the Bahamas sipping pina coladas all day, then utility is just a promise. Often that promise is admirable and well intentioned--but ultimately an unenforceable promise nonetheless. Outside of BTC, ETH, SOL, and a few others, nothing really passes this test. Noble new token models have emerged to solve this problem (shout out to MetaDAO), and today, we introduce our own.

Users that stake the Backpack token for at least a year will have the opportunity to exchange those tokens for equity at a fixed ratio--20% of the company today.

It's such a simple idea, but as far as I'm aware, this is the first time a user has been able to earn the equity of a company by just using the product. So obvious in hindsight, and something I hope others start to adopt as they march on their path to progressive decentralization--both in crypto and outside of the industry.

We have a lot more utility coming, things we'll share over the coming weeks, months, and year. As the Backpack community grows, we will decentralize the token, offering new things over time, some centralized like our equity offering, some decentralized as our product evolves. In the limit, I expect the token to represent more than anything a single company has to offer, but in the short run, it's the best we can do to show our long term commitment to our users.

I've said it before and I'll say it again. I can't promise anything. The only thing I can promise is commitment.

We go big or we go home--together, actually together.

I will STOP USING Meteora if they’re actually getting exposed by Zach

But honestly I can’t imagine it

People remember Libra and think it was Meteora

Here’s why I don’t think so:

If we look back at Libra it wasn’t classic insider trading from Meteora’s side

Ben supported Kelsier with “technical support” (whatever it means)

After Kelsier sniped their own token, they used Meteora’s DLMM pools to add one-sided liquidity, depositing only LIBRA while withdrawing SOL or USD equivalents.

This avoided direct market sells (which would have crashed the price immediately) and instead let retail buy pressure absorb the dumps indirectly

What I’m struggling to see is how Meteora could use its platform for insider trading beyond simply having more information ???

I’m not close with @MeteoraAG at all, but in the few conversations I’ve had with @0xSoju, he always was someone who would turn the whole company upside down to find any potential bad actors

And I think he did that after Libra...

What are the odds you crash the company you took over after an “insider scandal” just to do the same thing again lol

Honestly they also make enough money already... it's not like we had any billion dollar launches this year where you could make millions with insider information

And why would Zach dig up some old story that we already know?

Maybe I’m naive, but I have a strong feeling CT is overhyping this and the outcome won’t even involve the very big names

This is literally me https://t.co/hmg5b5vO34

Everyone is speculating

But no one is actually asking how these companies could have done the “insider trading”

Here’s how I’m thinking about it:

1. Meteora

Projects often work with Meteora to launch tokens using their tek

That could theoretically give them more data (timing, CA, etc.), which might allow early sniping and exits via one-sided LP

What speaks against this is that there haven’t been many billion dollar launches recently, and it’s unlikely Zach would base this on old Libra era stories

2. Axiom

Axiom’s setup can create many wallets to buy into new meme tokens, making it look like there are far more holders than there actually are.

This can enable “speed bumping” (a type of MEV), where insiders could potentially enter and exit before whales

Of course, it looks bad but is MEV really insider trading? I doubt it

3. MEXC

MEXC has a poor reputation on CT mainly due to:

- very early token listings (often with leverage)
- user reports about withdrawals and KYC

Zach has already written about MEXC several times. The White Whale is also a donor to Zach and has a long history of issues withdrawing funds from MEXC

In general, CEXes are harder to investigate since not everything is onchain which may be where the interviews Zach mentioned come into play?

4. Pump Fun

The main way insider behavior could happen on Pump Fun would be classic pump and dump or cabal schemes

Sometimes Pump Fun featured certain memecoins, but in 2026 the volume likely wasn’t large enough to generate major insider profits.

Their bonding mechanism is onchain and monitored by multiple protocols. Scams exist, but not in a way that clearly benefits employees directly.

5. Binance

Binance often gets accused of market manipulation and involvement in the 10/10 liquidation event.

However, Zach is currently doing work involving BSC wallets, which makes this scenario less likely.

So who is it then?

Crypto Twitter is extremely good at spreading rumors, creating noise, and making things way bigger than they are...

Even Zach said he didn’t expect this to go so viral

But interestingly, almost no one is talking about the wave of perp DEXes that suddenly appeared in Q3 and Q4…

My guess: it might be a project that isn’t even being discussed yet

But we’ll see
